title: Chloe's First Day with the School Animals
synopsis: Chloe starts her first day at a special school where friendly animals help children learn. She meets a rabbit teacher, a cat librarian, and other animal friends who make school fun and welcoming.

pages.text: Chloe walked into her new school holding Mama's hand. She felt a little nervous. The hallway was bright and colorful, with pictures of letters and numbers on the walls.

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes holding her mother's hand in a school hallway. Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk showing school hallway with alphabet and number drawings on walls, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board.
illustration.alt: Chloe holding her mother's hand in a school hallway

pages.text: In the classroom, Chloe met Mrs. Bunny, her teacher. Mrs. Bunny had soft brown fur and wore tiny glasses. 'Welcome to our school, Chloe!' she said with a warm smile. 'We have many animal friends here who love to help children learn.'

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes meeting a friendly brown rabbit teacher wearing small glasses in a classroom. Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk, school desks and educational posters visible, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board.
illustration.alt: Chloe meeting Mrs. Bunny the rabbit teacher

pages.text: Mrs. Bunny showed Chloe around the classroom. There were books, toys, and a cozy reading corner. 'This is where we read stories,' Mrs. Bunny explained. Chloe saw other children playing happily with puzzles and blocks.

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes exploring a classroom with Mrs. Bunny. Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk showing classroom with books, toys, reading corner, other children playing, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board.
illustration.alt: Chloe exploring the classroom with Mrs. Bunny

pages.text: At snack time, Chloe met Mr. Cat, the librarian. He had orange stripes and a friendly purr. 'Would you like to pick out a book?' he asked. Chloe nodded and chose a book about butterflies.

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes meeting an orange striped cat librarian in the school library. Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk, bookshelves and a butterfly book visible, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board.
illustration.alt: Chloe meeting Mr. Cat the librarian

pages.text: During playtime, Chloe met Penny the Pig, who helped with art projects. 'Let's paint a rainbow!' Penny squealed happily. Chloe giggled and dipped her brush in bright yellow paint.

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes painting with a friendly pink pig at an art table. Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk, rainbow painting, paint brushes and art supplies visible, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board.
illustration.alt: Chloe painting with Penny the Pig

pages.text: When Mama came to pick her up, Chloe was sad to leave. 'I love my new school!' she told Mama. 'The animal teachers are so nice, and I made new friends. Can I come back tomorrow?' Mama smiled and said, 'Of course, sweetie!'

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes hugging her mother goodbye while waving to Mrs. Bunny, Mr. Cat, and Penny the Pig. Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk, school setting, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board.
illustration.alt: Chloe saying goodbye to her animal teacher friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: Who was Chloe's teacher?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Bunny was Chloe's teacher who welcomed her to the classroom and showed her around.

questions.question: What did Mr. Cat help with at school?
questions.explanation: Mr. Cat was the librarian who helped Chloe choose a book about butterflies.

questions.question: What did Chloe paint with Penny the Pig?
questions.explanation: Penny the Pig helped Chloe paint a rainbow during art time.

questions.question: How did Chloe feel at the end of her first day?
questions.explanation: Chloe was happy and excited about school, telling her mama she loved it and wanted to come back tomorrow.
